REGISTER.HERO_TITLE: Think you're the smartest machinist at IMTS? Prove it.
REGISTER.HERO_SUBTITLE:
You've got 90 seconds to answer as many questions as you can. Climb the leaderboard, earn bragging rights, and finish in today's Top 3 to win prizes.
One shot per day. Make it count.

REGISTER.CONSENT_SHORT: By playing, you agree to be added to the Practical Machinist list.

SPONSOR.QUESTION_PLACEHOLDER: Which of our products is rated #1 for precision milling applications?
SPONSOR.UNLOCK_HINT: Watch the sponsor video to unlock the bonus question
SPONSOR.INTRO_BODY: The next {{ count }} questions come from today's sponsor — and they play by different rules. Each correct answer is worth a flat +{{ points }} points, not the usual multiplier. Don't leave them on the table.
SPONSOR.OUTRO_BODY: Scan the code to explore {{ sponsor }} and everything they brought to the booth.

RESULTS.PRIZE_BODY: Finish today's Top 3 and you'll win a prize. We'll text and email winners at the end of the day so you can claim your prize.
RESULTS.SHARE: Send a friend to the booth
RESULTS.COME_BACK_BODY: New trivia every day at the booth. One play per day.
RESULTS.FOOTER: Daily leaderboard resets at midnight · Winners notified by SMS and email
